fiveStar.name: Nebula Pennant
fiveStar.skill:
Increase Speed by 15/15/20/20/25/25/30. When Mayumi's Speed is over 100, for every 10 points of Speed above 100, increase Attack by 12.5%/16.2%/16.2%/20.0%/20.0%/23.8%/23.8% (up to a maximum of 100.0%/130.0%/130.0%/160.0%/160.0%/190.0%/190.0%).
After activating a skill, for every 40 stacks of total Velocity, increase party's damage by 3.4%/4.4%/4.4%/5.4%/5.4%/6.4%/6.4% for 2 turns (up to a maximum of 17.0%/22.0%/22.0%/27.0%/27.0%/32.0%/32.0%).

fourStar.name: Formula Pennant
fourStar.skill:
Increase Attack by 12.0%/12.0%/16.0%/16.0%/20.0%/20.0%/24.0%.
When activating Torque Boost, increase damage by 18.0%/23.4%/23.4%/28.8%/28.8%/34.2%/34.2%.
